Motion For Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-20-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Ruling: DEFENDANT COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION Motion For Terminating Sanctions is taken off calendar at the request of the moving party. Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

ARBITRATOR JURISDICTION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Jun-06-2017 Arbitration Award Filed

ORDER TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Mar-10-2017 Set To Order To Arbtitration Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Belem Lozanos Attendance And Testimony At Deposition And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-28-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:ATTY JAMES B. SUTHERLAND OF LAW OFFICE OF JAMES BACHAN TEL NO. 510-286-8900 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF.
ATTY TOM CORSBY OF CORSBY LAW GROUP TEL NO. 510-925-4228 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING- A R G U E D, Defendant Costco Wholesale Corp.'s ("Costco's") Motion to Compel Plaintiff Belem Lozano's Attendance and Testimony at Deposition is GRANTED. Costco's request for monetary sanctions against Plaintiff Belem Lozano in the amount of $2,111.60 is GRANTED. All other requests for sanctions, if any, are DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro tem: Douglas Robbins; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany; Not Reported.=302/JPT.

ASSIGN TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Feb-27-2017 Select Panel Of Arbitrators

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Discovery Responses
Off Calendar Jan-24-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. THOMAS C. CROSBY OF THE CROSBY LAW GROUP, TEL. NO. 1-510-925-4228 EXT. 101 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Discovery Responses - The defendant's motion to compel plaintiff to respond to defendant's Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Document Request is unopposed and granted. The plaintiff shall respond to said discovery within 20 days of service of copy of this Order with Notice of Entry. Monetary sanctions are awarded in the sum of $350.00, to paid within said 20 days. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro-tem Steven Stein; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/jpt

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2016 Assigned To Arbitration On Feb-27-17
